playbook.intent: A daily ~15-minute ritual: refresh the chart, read the slope, choose exactly one corrective lever (re-scope, re-assign, raise risk, or do nothing on purpose).
playbook.scope: A daily ~15-minute ritual: refresh the chart, read the slope, choose exactly one corrective lever (re-scope, re-assign, raise risk, or do nothing on purpose).

stage.name: Refresh the chart
stage.intent: Ensure the chart reflects today, not yesterday.

tasks.task: Pull current status from Jira / tracker
Verify scope baseline has not drifted

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the chart is current.

stage.name: Read the slope
stage.intent: Read the line, not the headline.

tasks.task: Compare actual slope vs ideal line
Identify whether the gap is widening, stable, or closing
Note any inflection in the last 3 data points

stage.decision-gate: Advance when slope direction is named with evidence.

stage.name: Pick one lever

tasks.task: List candidate levers: re-scope, re-assign, raise risk, do-nothing
Pick exactly one based on the slope read

stage.decision-gate: Advance when exactly one lever is chosen (not zero, not two).

stage.name: Communicate the lever
stage.intent: Surface the call where it matters.

tasks.task: Tell the team what is changing
Tell the client / leadership if scope or schedule moved
Update the risk register if 'raise risk' was the lever

stage.decision-gate: Required: the chosen lever is communicated within 1 hour.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content update-the-burndown-burnup-and-decide-one-corrective-action --format md, agent: faion get-content update-the-burndown-burnup-and-decide-one-corrective-action --format context, json: faion get-content update-the-burndown-burnup-and-decide-one-corrective-action --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
